metadata.title: Lucas Arrial — AI tools platform
metadata.description: Clone your voice with AI in minutes. AI tools platform for creators and entrepreneurs.

hero.description: The AI tools platform for creators, entrepreneurs and studios. Train your voice once. Generate infinite audio.

1.title: Studios charge a fortune
1.body: Pro voice-overs cost $600 to $3,000 per project. Every new piece, a new invoice.

2.title: Delivery takes days
2.body: Booking, recording, editing, review. From brief to final audio, 5 to 10 business days.

3.title: Alternatives sound robotic
3.body: Generic TTS is not your voice. Off-the-shelf AI voices sound fake. Your brand deserves better.

solution.title: Your voice, on demand.
solution.body: Train once with 2 to 10 minutes of audio. The AI learns your intonation, rhythm and timbre. Then generate as much audio as you want, in seconds.

platform.title: More than voice.
platform.subtitle: A whole AI tools platform. Voice cloning is just the start.

1.title: 100% your voice
1.body: Per-user LoRA models. Your voice stays yours, trained on your audio.

2.title: Inference in seconds
2.body: Auto-scaling GPU workers. Celery queue, in-app notification when ready.

3.title: 50+ languages
3.body: Multilingual model. Your voice speaks Portuguese, English, Spanish and more.

4.title: No lock-in
4.body: Export your audio. Cancel anytime. No loyalty contracts, no tricks.

cta.title: Start free.
cta.body: 3 free voice models. No credit card. No commitment.
